chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit 2087 of 2015 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature of the Judge -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For arguments 02.09.2024 Mr. Fahad Ali Hashmi, advocate for the plaintiff Mr. Shamshad Ali Narejo, advocate for defendant Mr. Muhammad Javed, AAG The suit had impugned notice dated 17.09.2015, issued by the Sindh Revenue Board. It is jointly submitted that the plaintiff shall respond to the notice and subject to adjudication thereof no coercive action be taken there against by the defendant. It is jointly prayed that the suit may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Amjad
